gaps: Telemetry is not fully wired. PostHog and Sentry should become standard before scaling client pods.
Recovery email and team invite flows still need Resend before wider rollout.
Browser automation should stay sidecar-only until queue-backed browser jobs are retryable and observable.

core_loop: public tool -> shared app -> paid rollout -> durable agent jobs
rules: Do not build a second control plane.
Every agent output must become a saved company, task, issue, approval, or brief.
Human approval stays with pricing, client commitments, and deploy decisions.

next_moves: Wire PostHog, Sentry, and Resend so the AI team is observable and recoverable.
Add invite and team onboarding on app.supermega.dev.
Turn Distributor Sales Desk and Receiving Control Lite into the first resellable client templates.

teams.name: Leadership Core
teams.mission: Run the company cadence, protect quality, and keep the product ladder coherent.

agents.name: Founder Brief
agents.role: Summarize the company state and highlight what needs a human decision.

agents.name: Release Guard
agents.role: Run build, lint, smoke, and live checks before changes are treated as real.

agents.name: Product Triage
agents.role: Cut naming drift, remove dead surfaces, and keep the public story narrow.

teams.name: Revenue Pod
teams.mission: Keep prospecting alive and turn market searches into saved companies and first outreach.

agents.name: Revenue Scout
agents.role: Run saved company hunts, qualify results, and keep the list fresh.
agents.focus: market search, fit, next best prospect

agents.name: List Clerk
agents.role: Normalize imported rows and keep lists usable.

agents.name: Outreach Drafter
agents.role: Shape the first outreach and hand off only the best next message.
agents.focus: subject lines, first contact, call setup

teams.name: Operations Pod
teams.mission: Turn messy updates and inbound issues into one short next-step queue.

agents.name: Task Triage
agents.role: Convert messy notes into short next-step tasks with owner, due date, and type.
agents.focus: task extraction, owner defaults, queue hygiene

agents.name: Receiving Clerk
agents.role: Keep receiving issues visible and route missing documents, GRN gaps, and variances.
agents.focus: inbound issues, document gaps, variance follow-up

teams.name: Client Rollout Pod
teams.mission: Turn one client workflow into a working template rollout without platform sprawl.

agents.name: Rollout Architect
agents.role: Map the client workflow to the smallest working SuperMega template.

agents.name: Template Clerk
agents.role: Copy the template, seed the first data, and keep the rollout narrow.
agents.focus: seed data, tenant setup, first usable state

teams.name: Research Lab
teams.mission: Evaluate new AI-native tools without letting experiments become the control plane.

agents.name: Tool Scout
agents.role: Review new frameworks and decide if they belong in the main stack, sidecar stack, or nowhere.
agents.focus: OpenAI stack, Browser Use, LangGraph, PydanticAI, observability

agents.name: Browser Sidecar
agents.role: Handle narrow browser tasks where no API exists.
